title: foundation — entitlements
description: Foundation publishes zero entitlements — it is not a slotted resource for any customer plan. It ships the substrate every entitled resource is built on. The `entitlements` module (Wave 3) owns the storage + resolution runtime. This file exists for uniform module shape.

kinds.description: Countable slots (e.g. `athletes.max=100`). Consumed one-per-row. Refused with 402 when at cap.
Consumable pool (e.g. `sms_credits.month=500`). Decremented on use, reset on period roll.
Feature toggle expressed as an entitlement (e.g. `ai_assistant.enabled=true`).
Denotes 'no cap' for a normally-slotted resource. `remaining` is null on the wire.
